src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Device.ja.general_idea: Added import for java.util.UUID to support unique device identification.
Introduced a UUID field to uniquely identify each device instance.
Added a boolean field to track the active/inactive status of the device.
Renamed the name field from _strName to _name for cleaner naming conventions.
Changed constructor exception from InstantiationException to IllegalArgumentException for better semantic correctness.
Extracted name validation logic into a dedicated setter method with improved error message.

Implemented toString method to provide a string representation of the device state.

Replace direct instantiation of Room with a call to the injected RoomFactory.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/House.jav.general_idea: Return an unmodifiable copy of the rooms list to enforce encapsulation.

Rename parameter dWidth to width to follow standard naming conventions.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Introduced factory dependencies to decouple object creation from the Location class.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..human_impl: Changed constructor to `protected Location(String street, String zipCode, int doorNumber, double latitude, double longitude, AddressFactory addressFactory, GpsFactory gpsFactory)`.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Location..general_idea: Switched constructor exception from InstantiationException to IllegalArgumentException for better semantic correctness.
Removed manual argument validation in favor of factory-based creation or external validation.

Introduce a UUID field to uniquely identify each Room instance.
Generate a random UUID for the room ID during construction.
Provide a public getter to access the room's unique identifier.

Rename the floor field from _nFloor to _floor for cleaner naming conventions.
Rename the device list field from _listDevices to _deviceList for cleaner naming conventions.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/Room.java.general_idea: Extract the logic of adding a device to the list into a protected method for extensibility.
Return an unmodifiable copy of the device list using List.copyOf() to enforce encapsulation.
Adopt modern Java coding style with single-line braces and compact method definitions.

src/main/java/SmartHome/domain/SensorTyp.general_idea: Restrict instantiation of SensorType to subclasses by changing constructor visibility from public to protected.
Strengthen input validation to reject strings containing only whitespace characters.

Removed the postalCode field as it is no longer part of the DTO structure.
Added a new _gps field to store GPS location data.
Updated constructor to map the new _address field from location.getAddress().toString().
Updated constructor to map the new _gps field from location.getGpsLocation().toString().
Removed constructor assignment for the deleted street field.
Removed constructor assignment for the deleted postalCode field.
Added a toString method to provide a string representation of the LocationDTO.
